title: St. John's Church
tagline: St. John's Church — spiritual town of West Bengal

overview.short: St. John's Church is a much-loved spiritual town in West Bengal, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: St. John's Church, Midnapore is a church made by the Church Mission Society of England. It was built in 1851 at Sekpura in Midnapore, Paschim Medinipur district in the Indian state of West Bengal. There are several notable graves inside the church cemetery.

topPlaces.name: Midnapore
topPlaces.description: Midnapore (Bengali pronunciation: [medinipur]), is a city known for its history in the Indian state of West Bengal. It is the headquarters of the Paschim Medinipur district.

topPlaces.name: Medinipur division
topPlaces.description: Medinipur division is one of the 5 divisions in the Indian state of West Bengal. It is the westernmost division of West Bengal.

topPlaces.name: Vidyasagar Shishu Niketan
topPlaces.description: Vidyasagar Shishu Niketan is a private primary and higher secondary English-medium school in Midnapore in West Bengal, India. Established in 1975, the school is spread across two campuses in the city, and run by the Society for the Betterment of Education, a local group under the supervision of the district administration.

topPlaces.name: Midnapore Sadar (community development block)
topPlaces.description: Midnapore Sadar is a community development block that forms an administrative division in Medinipur Sadar subdivision of Paschim Medinipur district in the Indian state of West Bengal.

topPlaces.name: Vidyasagar Vidyapith
topPlaces.description: Vidyasagar Vidyapith Boys' School, popularly known as Bangla School, is one of the oldest school located in Midnapore town, West Bengal, India. This school was established with the blessings of Ishwar Chandra Vidyasagar, the 19th century educationist and social reformer of Bengal, on 22 August 1845.

topPlaces.name: Matkatpur
topPlaces.description: Matkatpur (also called Matkadpur) is a village in Kharagpur I CD Block in Kharagpur subdivision of Paschim Medinipur district in the state of West Bengal, India.

topPlaces.name: Satkul
topPlaces.description: Satkul (also referred to as Satkui) is a village, in the Kharagpur I CD block in the Kharagpur subdivision of the Paschim Medinipur district in the state of West Bengal, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. John's Church?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. John's Church is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. John's Church?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose International Airport, Kolkata (119 km) and the nearest railway station is Howrah Junction (Kolkata) (107 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. John's Church?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. John's Church at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. John's Church?
faq.a: Stays in St. John's Church start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. John's Church?
faq.a: The top attractions are Midnapore, Medinipur division, Vidyasagar Shishu Niketan, Midnapore Sadar (community development block), Vidyasagar Vidyapith.
